texto: I have tried to tell him in a dozen different ways that I am only six inches tall. I've told him I am as tall as his heart, that he could hold all of me in his hand, that I am shorter than I appear. Every time, he's acted as though I'm saying something romantic or poetic.
explicacao: Citação de Jennie Bates Bozic sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I have tried to tell him in a dozen different ways that I am only six inches tall. I've told him …” articula amor, heartache, poetic-prose em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como poetic-prose e romantic.
